text.title: Edge and CDN Strategy Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Edge and CDN Strategy output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: tiers from targeted to full with approval matrix

forbidden.pattern: cache_key_policy uses wildcards in query without allowlist

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: edge_platform populated with a typed value
cache_key_policy populated with a typed value
origin_shield populated with a typed value
edge_auth_pattern populated with a typed value
purge_strategy populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
